title: rubus hirtus var. adauctus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. adauctus, also known as the thistle thorn, is a rare and lesser-known species of raspberry that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. adauctus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive well-being. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in salves and creams for topical application.
